# services.dragonflydb

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dragonflydb`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dragonflydb.bind` | `null or string` | The IP interface to bind to. `null` means "all interfaces". |
| `services.dragonflydb.cacheMode` | `null or boolean` | Once this mode is on, Dragonfly will evict items least likely to be stumbled upon in the future but only when it is near maxmemory limit. |
| `services.dragonflydb.dbNum` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Maximum number of supported databases for `select` |
| `services.dragonflydb.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable DragonflyDB. |
| `services.dragonflydb.keysOutputLimit` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum number of returned keys in keys command. `keys` is a dangerous command. We truncate its result to avoid blowup in memory when fetching too many keys. |
| `services.dragonflydb.maxMemory` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | The maximum amount of memory to use for storage (in bytes). `null` means this will be automatically set. |
| `services.dragonflydb.memcachePort` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | To enable memcached compatible API on this port. `null` means disabled. |
| `services.dragonflydb.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The TCP port to accept connections. |
| `services.dragonflydb.requirePass` | `null or string` | Password for database |
| `services.dragonflydb.user` | `string` | The user to run DragonflyDB as |
